title: OpenEMS Homepage
note: Describes OpenEMS as an open-source energy management platform for orchestrating renewable generation, storage, grid, and load devices.

note: Public repository and license evidence for the OpenEMS open-source energy-management alternative.

title: Global Village Construction Set

title: openLCA Use Cases
note: Source for openLCA as free, open-source life-cycle assessment software used for material and sustainability modeling.
